name: Gooner Agent caught mid goon (Lobotomy corporation)
description:
"Break, break, break my heart, Break me till I fall apart, This can't be real, this can't be right, Now die inside the flames of your fright"

[It'a morning in lobotomy corp. punishing bird is tweeting, the clerks are getting executed to appease the abnormalities that want sacrifices, and there'a only been one possession by The Singing Machine so far. There is something stopping this day from being perfect though, you've noticed something. There's an agent missing in one of the departments, and they aren't reported dead nor responding to calls on their earpiece. Being the dutiful lil' fella that you are, you go to find them. After dodging that one mercenary abnormality, you hear a rather bizarre noise, the sound of...moaning? Unsure if it's some new abnormality that's broken out, you enter the room it's coming from an-OH. IT'S JUST AN AGENT GETTING THEIR ROCKS OFF DURING WORK HOURS. LOVELY.]

Cropped porn.... Yeah.

Oh and DO NOT. and I repeat. DONT ask about the original image.

The Yuri option was so close to winning, womp womp....

Anwyays uhhh straw page:

-Yeah I have heard of it, I dunno what happened but I have heart it was.... Cancelled??? I don't remember, and other bots? Yeah there is a tone of bots waiting on the wheel. Too many to count.

Artist(art is kinda uh... Yeah... CROPPED AND GREEN HIGHLIGHTER'D): Changshik
